title: mentha aquatica var. latifolia
intro: Mentha aquatica var. latifolia, commonly known as broad-leaved water mint, is a variant of the water mint plant that is characterized by its broad leaves and a more delicate flavor compared to other mint species. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) due to its high menthol content. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. latifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Mentha aquatica var. latifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
